welcome.subtitle: You have completed {{completed}} of {{total}} video lessons. Keep up the good work!

awaiting.title: All done — please wait for your results!
awaiting.body: You have completed every tutorial and submitted all your tests. Results are being reviewed — you will receive a notification as soon as they are announced.

message.submitted: You have submitted this test. Results will be announced by the admin — please wait for further updates.
message.formative: Complete all required videos in Phase 1 before this test goes live. If you wish, you can also go ahead and watch the Phase 3 add-on videos in advance.
message.screening: Complete all add-on videos to become eligible for this test. While you wait, feel free to go back and revise the previous videos.
message.default: Complete all required videos to become eligible for this test.

badges.title: Earned Badges
badges.empty: Complete courses & assessments to unlock achievements.
